verdict: Mechanical suction device with minimal skincare ingredients—relies primarily on physical extraction technology rather than chemical formulations. Moderate safety concerns regarding skin irritation from aggressive suction. Good budget value but carries overuse risks.

_research.name: Pore Vacuum Blackhead Remover USB Rechargeable
_research.con: Aggressive suction can cause redness, irritation, and broken capillaries with overuse; not ingredient-dependent.
